channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)

item.title: Oral renal-clearable gold supraclusters for near-infrared II urinary diagnosis of ulcerative colitis.
item.description: Biomaterials - Fluorescence biosensing offers a promising transformative strategy for non-invasively diagnosing diseases, but its deployment for clinical urinalysis is largely hindered by the lack of fluorescent ...
